ques: Identify a Specialization on Coursera that teaches C++ programming for beginners, provide the name and what the learning outcomes are.
answer: Specialization: "Programming in C++: A Hands-on Introduction" by Codio (Beginner). Learning outcomes: (1) Automate everyday, repetitive tasks using C++ programs; (2) Create engaging, graphical-based programs; (3) Develop a firm foundation of Computer Science concepts you can bring to any language you learn.
